creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
The problem has occurred on multiple laptops.  The two I use most are using rtwn and iwn (wifi) most of the time.  They have re and im Ethernet, but I don't often plug in.

I'll run with

umount -A -t nfs

in my rc.suspend for a while and report and report back on any issues.

I assume it's safe to manually unmount behind automount's back this way.  I used automount -u initially to ensure that automount was aware of any status changes to filesystems it controls.
